title: Cluster Checklist
description: The full set of verifiable requirements for a cluster, grouped by section. Assignment to briefs lives in the briefs' checklist arrays, not here. C-numbers are sequential across the cluster and never renumbered.

cluster.description: Cluster name, matching the directory under docs/design/

name.description: Work phase or component — sections outlive the briefs that deliver them

id.description: Sequential across the whole cluster, not per-section

text.description: One sentence, readable as a true/false assertion, checkable by reading code, running a command, or inspecting output. Wording is stable once a brief cites the ID.

done.description: True only when delivered AND verified by review — the dev's claim alone does not flip this
